channel.title: Kara Mullane - Author
channel.description: Award-winning children's book author. Empowering kids to be their best in today's world.

item.title: Let me introduce myself...
item.description: Hello, I’m Kara A. Mullane, a children’s book author. I haven’t always been a writer, but it has been my dream since I was young. I so...
item.dc:creator: Kara A. Mullane
